My MAGA opponent, Anna Paulina Luna, just hosted a Russian delegation at the United States Capitol.
Not diplomats. Not allies. Officials from Putin's regime — including the grandson of a Stalin aide — while Russia is actively helping Iran kill Americans.
She has zero experience in diplomatic relations. Zero background in foreign policy. Zero business hosting foreign adversaries in the halls of Congress.
But that's who Luna is.
She's the latest MAGA young gun who will do or say anything to get headlines — severely lacking in morals or ability to actually do her job.
Pro-Ukraine lawmakers are furious. One Republican congressman compared it to "having a visit by the Third Reich." The Senate Intelligence Committee's ranking member called it "terribly problematic." Even members of her own party are saying Putin's cronies should never have been allowed on Capitol Hill.
And Luna posted photos, calling it "fostering dialogue."
This isn't governing. It's a stunt. A dangerous, reckless stunt that undermines our national security while Russia shares intelligence with Iran to kill American soldiers.
I'm Earle Ford — Army veteran, former IRS investigator — and I'm running to replace her because Florida's 13th district deserves better than a representative who treats Congress like a reality show audition.
Luna will do anything for attention. Host Russian officials. Threaten government shutdowns. Push voter suppression. Whatever gets her on Fox News.
But she won't actually do her job. And that's disqualifying.
If you're ready to flip this seat and elect someone who understands what national security actually means, chip in right now.

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: the GOP’s dangerous priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

As a physician, I took an oath to put the well-being of my patients first. But looking at the current landscape in Washington, it’s clear that most in the GOP don't share that same commitment.

**Republicans are currently plotting to kick more Americans off of their health care to pay for the war in Iran.** It’s a move that isn’t just irresponsible — it’s morally wrong. At a time when families across our district are already struggling to afford their rent, gas, groceries, and health care premiums, this is the last thing we should be doing.

I’ve seen firsthand what happens when people lose access to care. Prevention becomes an emergency, and manageable conditions become life-threatening.

[**At this critical time, our team has set a $6,133 goal for our mid-month fundraising deadline. Peter, will you chip in $25 or anything you can to help me continue the fight to lower costs and reinvest back into Northern Californian families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129684303/615182370/-1605645422?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_AB_20260414_FR_MMFR_0_6MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2JkZTQ5OS1iYTNhLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHsfikEVA_-f2d7Z6pDmKgNiWS_A6_pB2ENRhp39g9E=)

Peter,
Republicans called a secret vote in the dead of night last night to reauthorize Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), legislation that would give the Trump administration a back door to surveil and collect data on Americans without a warrant.
Section 702 is an unconstitutional attack on our right to privacy. Trump wants it renewed without added protections to silence opposition while waging an unpopular war of choice in Iran. We can’t give him that power.

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

subject: What Last Night Showed

body:
Did you catch the debate? You don’t want to miss it.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,Last night's debate in Hillsboro put the focus where it belongs; on the issues Oregonians are dealing with every day.Cost of living. Public safety. Housing. Systems that aren't working the way they should.Those are the questions that came up, and they're the same ones I hear traveling across the state.I was glad to be on that stage answering them. Because this isn't something I'm stepping into for the first time. As a county commissioner, I'm already doing this work, expanding mental health and addiction services, addressing homelessness, managing budgets, and making decisions that affect people's day-to-day lives.That experience makes a difference in my ability to govern.It shapes how I approach these issues, not as talking points, but as systems that need to work.That's what I focused on last night.There are different approaches in this race. Some talk about the problems. Others are coming at it from outside government.I've spent years inside these systems, building programs, fixing gaps, and delivering results.That's the difference I bring.If you didn't have a chance to watch, [you can see the full debate here](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-y/).We're heading into the final stretch of this race.If you believe Oregon needs leadership grounded in real experience and focused on results, [I'm asking for your support.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-j/) Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor
Marion County Commissioner**P.S.** I'll keep showing up, answering questions, and earning support the right way. As a county commissioner, I'm already doing this work, expanding mental health and addiction services, addressing homelessness, managing budgets, and making decisions that affect people's day-to-day lives.That experience makes a difference in my ability to govern.It shapes how I approach these issues, not as talking points, but as systems that need to work.That's what I focused on last night.There are different approaches in this race. Some talk about the problems. Others are coming at it from outside government.I've spent years inside these systems, building programs, fixing gaps, and delivering results.That's the difference I bring.If you didn't have a chance to watch, heading into the final stretch of this race.If you believe Oregon needs leadership grounded in real experience and focused on results, Danielle Bethell Republican for Governor Marion County CommissionerP.S. I'll keep showing up, answering questions, and earning support the right way. | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 |
